detail.description: Gage Workman flies out to left fielder Jose Siri.
Gage Workman flies out to center fielder Mike Trout.
Gage Workman grounds out, second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Vaughn Grissom.
Gage Workman flies out to left fielder Wade Meckler.
Gage Workman grounds out, third baseman Donovan Walton to first baseman Vaughn Grissom.
Gage Workman lines out sharply to right fielder Angel Martínez.
Gage Workman flies out to center fielder Steven Kwan.

Tigers challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Tigers challenged (force play), call on the field was upheld: Gage Workman grounds into a force out, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Davis Schneider. Matt Vierling out at 2nd. Gage Workman to 1st.
Gage Workman singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango.
Gage Workman grounds out, second baseman Lenyn Sosa to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Gage Workman lines out to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango.
Gage Workman grounds out sharply, second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Mark Vientos.
Gage Workman doubles (2) on a line drive to right fielder Carson Benge.
Gage Workman homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Colt Keith scores. Riley Greene scores.
Gage Workman lines out to right fielder Carson Benge.
Gage Workman grounds out, shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Mark Vientos.
Gage Workman grounds out to first baseman Mark Vientos.
Gage Workman doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Juan Soto. Wenceel Pérez to 3rd.
Gage Workman flies out sharply to center fielder Lane Thomas.
Gage Workman homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Spencer Torkelson scores.
Gage Workman doubles (3) on a sharp fly ball to right fielder Colton Cowser.
Gage Workman grounds out, pitcher Seranthony Domínguez to first baseman Miguel Vargas.
